---
name: New skill / guide request
about: Suggest a new Next.js topic, architecture guide, or agent skill to add
title: "[Skill Request] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: kasinadhsarma
---

## What topic should be covered?

<!-- e.g. "Authentication with Auth.js", "Testing Server Actions with Vitest", "i18n routing" -->

## Why is it missing / what gap does it fill?

<!-- Who needs this and in what situation would they reach for it? -->

## Do you know this Next.js topic well?

- [ ] I understand this area well and can draft the content
- [ ] I know the topic exists but need help with the details
- [ ] I just want to flag the gap — someone else should write it

## Relevant links or references

<!-- Official Next.js docs, npm packages, existing blog posts, etc. -->

## Scope estimate

<!-- How many major sections would this guide need? Rough line count estimate? -->

## Would this be a guide, an agent skill, or both?

- [ ] Developer-facing guide (in `docs/`)
- [ ] Agent skill (structured for AI coding assistants)
- [ ] Both

## Which Next.js version does this apply to?

<!-- e.g. "15.x only", "applies to both 14 and 15 with noted differences" -->
